recommended_naming_rule: Use *_TRUE suffix for any proposed phase that collides with an already-canonical historical or live label; preserve historical labels untouched.

collisions.resolution: Suffix with _TRUE and keep the genuine review label historical.
Suffix with _TRUE and treat cleanup as historical evidence, not part of the new track.
Suffix with _TRUE and preserve the residual safe-resolution handoff as closed history.
Suffix with _TRUE and keep blocked residuals closure historical.
